atoms.source_hunk_hint: @@ around pub mod payload; / pub use spc::SpcVerifierImpl;
atoms.source_snippet: pub mod spc; pub use spc::SpcVerifierImpl;
atoms.semantic_claim: The reth-node-ethereum crate publicly declares the SPC bridge module and re-exports SpcVerifierImpl so downstream nodebuilder code can wrap the concrete SPC verifier as the reth_evm::spc::SpcVerifier trait object used during block execution.

destinations.snippet: pub mod spc; pub use spc::SpcVerifierImpl;
destinations.evidence: The Ethereum node crate now declares the SPC bridge module and re-exports SpcVerifierImpl.

destinations.snippet: pub struct SpcVerifierImpl<N> where N: FullNodeTypes { inner: Arc<ConcreteSpcVerifier<N::Provider>>, _phantom: PhantomData<N> }
destinations.evidence: The backing bridge file now exists and stores the provider-backed concrete verifier.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Compile ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal against the v2.2 port and expect unresolved reth_node_ethereum::SpcVerifierImpl unless the public export and backing bridge exist.
atoms.notes: Resolved by 7f8a668d24: pub mod spc and pub use spc::SpcVerifierImpl now exist with the backing bridge module.

adversarial_reviews.reason: Mechanical review completed; remaining non-exact atoms are now confirmed covered, confirmed missing, intentionally absent, or support/test/telemetry only.

summary: Mechanical re-review complete after 7f8a668d24. The public SPC module and SpcVerifierImpl re-export are now present in reth-node-ethereum.
notes: The prior compile/integration blocker for nodebuilder's reth_node_ethereum::SpcVerifierImpl import is closed.
